rows.label: qev065103_MSG0001
rows.name:
Do not touch me with those filthy hands.
Who do you think I am?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065103_MSG0002
rows.name:
I am Fortun, the king of the Definians who has governed
the galaxy's knowledge since the distant ancient times.
You lower lifeforms, fix your attitudes at once.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065103_SEL0011
rows.name: Treat Fortun politely as a king.

rows.label: qev065103_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hmph... For a lower lifeform, you are capable of
intelligent action, it seems.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065103_MSG0004
rows.name:
Then I shall not resist.
Take me wherever you please.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065103_MSG0005
rows.name:
Since you will eventually be killed by my daughters
anyway... yes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065103_MSG0006
rows.name:
What an attitude typical of a lower lifeform.
With this, you have incurred a massive penalty against me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065103_MSG0007
rows.name:
Your name is [ST:playername ]... is it?
Eventually, I will have my daughters dispose of you
and your companions as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065103_MSG0008
rows.name:
...Hehe? What are you so surprised about?
There is nothing that exists in this universe
that I do not know.[ST:wait ]
